species: Cluster II mixotrophs (MAGs of Hydrogenophaga, Polaromonas, Dechloromonas and related versatile Betaproteobacteria)

growth_records.strain: metagenome-assembled genomes (MAG cluster), no isolate strains
growth_records.medium: 13C-bicarbonate + thiosulfate amended Hainich CZE groundwater microcosm (well H41)
growth_records.cite: Taubert, Martin et al. Bolstering fitness via CO2 fixation and organic carbon uptake: mixotrophs in modern groundwater. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01163-x. [PMC8941145]
growth_records.snippet: Exhibiting generation times between 2 and 4 days (Fig. 3), MAGs representing these mixotrophs were more than twice as abundant as those of cluster I, accounting for 26% of the total normalized coverage.
growth_records.notes: Generation time reported as a RANGE 2-4 days for the cluster. Representative mu computed at midpoint 3 days: mu = ln2/(3*24 h) = 0.693147/72 = 0.009627 h-1; doubling_time_h = 72. Range bounds: mu = 0.01444 h-1 (2 d) to 0.00722 h-1 (4 d). Cluster/genus-level, environmental microcosm; no per-organism uptake/secretion rates. [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]
